series_metadata.series_title: Daily statements of custodial STAR Ohio accounts
series_metadata.series_description: A packet of documents that includes a report from the investment inventory software that shows all contributions, withdrawals, and interest paid on a given day for STAR Ohio assets held by funds for which the Treasurer acts as custodian. This report is then reconciled against statements from the STAR Ohio web site, which are also included in this packet, and that show contributions and withdrawals from STAR Ohio for the corresponding business day.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 6 fiscal years. ; Paper: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 6 fiscal years
